texto: The road to happiness lies in two simple principles: find what it is that interests you and that you can do well and when you find it put your whole soul into it-every bit of energy and ambition and natural ability you have.
explicacao: Citação de John D. Rockefeller III sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The road to happiness lies in two simple principles: find what it is that interests you and that …” articula reflexao, happiness, simple em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.

texto: Everyone likes to think that he has done reasonably well in life so that it comes as a shock to find our children believing differently. The temptation is to tune them out it takes much more courage to listen.
